who: clinical practice managers processing 10–20 patient records/month
offer: For clinical practice managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We streamline reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of records and billing.
problem: Inaccurate billing due to mismatched patient records.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for clinical practice managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to clinical practice managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual entry of patient and billing records
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
